name: Chocolate Apple Crisp
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate mini morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking soda, and salt.
3. With a pastry blender or 2 knives, cut in butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
4. Stir in oats; press half of the oat mixture into a greased 13x9-inch baking pan.
5. To the remaining oat mixture, add NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate mini morsels, apples, and pecans; stir to combine.
6. Sprinkle over the base.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes until lightly browned.
8. Cool slightly; cut into squares.
9. Makes about 15 servings.
